title: How to Fix This Annoying YouTube Shorts Glitch👷🏻

transcript.text: Why does YouTube tell you how old videos are? But it doesn't tell you how old shorts are. It's really annoying that. Fortunately, there's a fix. All you need to do is install this browser extension called vidIQ, which is free. And once you've got it, it'll add tons of features to YouTube, including when the shorts were published, which is really handy for research. It'll also give you a full breakdown on how a YouTube short is performing. And it'll give you tons of information about YouTube videos, as well. So, yeah, just search for this in your favorite browser extension to start growing your channel.
